data.title: PayPal to acquire Cymbio to expand merchant reach into AI shopping channels
data.description: Technology companies including Microsoft, OpenAI, Google and Perplexity are adding shopping and product recommendation capabilities to their AI assistants, prompting merchants and commerce providers to adapt to new ways consumers find and buy products.

data.title: Why Fastenal is maintaining focus on digital commerce
data.description: The results underscore Fastenal’s shift toward a digitally integrated operating model.

data.title: Robertet launches B2B ecommerce platform in U.S. and Canada
data.description: The platform, e-Robertet, allows professional customers to browse, sample, and purchase ingredients including essential oils, absolutes, extracts, CO₂ extracts, and specialty naturals directly online.

data.title: Platform provider commercetools introduces standalone agentic commerce
data.description: The launch follows commercetools’ recent support for emerging agentic commerce standards.

data.title: D&H expands logistics unit with acquisition of Fulfillment.com
data.description: D&H said the move reflects growing demand from brands for outsourced fulfillment and cross-border logistics as ecommerce volumes and service expectations increase.
